necessityProof.blockerResolved: Runtime-shell candidate, post-decision, and chain-stop reports still repeated the same markdown frame after v2131 even though their local differences were limited to decision-record rows and Java/mini-kv evidence snippets.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance and N5 Phase-B merge planning can now classify more runtime-shell governance reports as builder-backed before separating full reports from preview section renderers.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared verification report builder owns the report frame. Candidate/chain decision row projections, requirement/no-go strings, continuation options, and Java/mini-kv evidence file plus expected-snippet subsections remain local because they describe report-specific governance state.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No helper was added. A future helper candidate must cover a repeated local row grammar across at least three remaining runtime-shell reports and pass temporary legacy exact comparison.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 6 runtime-shell candidate/chain/post-decision tests --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2103-renderer-consolidation-batch-15-v2132.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2132 only changes Node markdown rendering for existing runtime-shell governance reports and consumes frozen profile data; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, upstream service startup, or schema changes.
